title: Warm up
content: The slide shows three different scenarios related to Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image appears to correspond to a unique setting or activity.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide introduces a theme of transformation within China. The imagery suggests urban and cultural development as part of a journey through the nation.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching city development strategies. It emphasizes local features, development strategies, and positive outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide matches Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou with specific development strategies. Each city aligns with technology integration, sustainable development, or tourism growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: This slide examines city dynamics from a taxi driver's perspective. It underscores evolving nation strategies tailored to enhance city development based on unique features.
